text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Takarazuka Kinen arrives.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's get charged up for an electrifying
race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide may be a strong rival, but I'm armed
with tons of passion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You can bet that I'll bring some super exciting
moments to this race, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Hayahide! Good luck to both of us!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's make it a great race that really wows the
audience!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: A race to wow them... I see.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! So give me all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Of course. You had better do the same.
